subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted! O ye who are firm! O ye who are zealous... ...The greatest affair and the most important matter today is to establish a Mashriqu'l-Adhkar
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذبون ایها الثابتون ایها الغیورون فی خدمت امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of prayer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
